notes: Requested workflow wrappers such as task:pull, ag:workflow, workflow:execute, and workflow:ship are absent in package.json, so the issue workflow is executed directly against repo scripts and evidence artifacts.
Issue #112 acceptance criteria were audited in docs/reports/ISSUE-112-verification.md before entering ship preparation.

Merge Readiness Review storage/API is additive; GitHub check-run emission, source-inventory policy, branch-protection enforcement, PR summary rendering, standalone OpenAPI, and normalized findings tables remain out of scope.
